# Claude Console

> AI Registry entry [AIR-11](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-11/claude-console) — status **Production** as of 2026-04-20. Departments: ai-office.

**Category:** AI Model API Platform / Development Console
**Cost per User/Month:** Included in Claude Teams subscription (API credits separate, usage-based)
**Number of Licences:** 1
**Total Monthly Cost:** Usage-based
**Departments:** AI Policy

## Overview

The Anthropic Console (console.anthropic.com) is Anthropic's developer platform for managing Claude API access, API keys, usage monitoring, and model configuration. Distinct from the consumer Claude.ai product (AIR-10). Used by the AI Office to manage API keys that power Claude Code (AIR-13), MCP integrations, and custom AI automations.

## Capabilities

* API key management — Create, rotate, manage API keys
* Usage monitoring — Real-time dashboards for API usage, costs, rate limits
* Workbench — Interactive prompt testing and model comparison
* Model selection — Access to Claude Opus, Sonnet, Haiku
* Prompt caching — Cache system prompts to reduce costs
* Batch API — Async batch processing at 50% cost reduction
* Rate limit management
* Billing management — Configurable spend limits

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliant
* No training on API data — explicit guarantee
* 30-day data retention for trust/safety, then deleted
* API key security: rotation, scoping

## Relevance to Janus Digital

Control plane for all programmatic Claude usage. Manages API keys that power Claude Code, MCP integrations, custom automations. Increasingly critical for cost management, key rotation, usage monitoring as AI Office automation grows.

*AI Office infrastructure. Single licence managed by AI Policy.*
